title: Mouthwatering Charred Indian Beef Curry
description: A flavorful and spicy Tamil-inspired beef curry dish featuring charred and crumbly beef in a rich gravy, served with a beurre-monte sauce on a wooden board.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat and sear the beef cubes until charred on all sides.
Remove the beef from the skillet and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook until it is lightly browned.
Add the chopped tomato, ginger paste, and garlic paste to the skillet and cook until the tomato is soft.
Add the curry powder to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the beef broth to the skillet and bring to a boil.
Return the beef to the skillet and simmer until it is cooked through and the sauce has thickened.
Stir in the beurre-monte sauce and season with salt to taste.
Serve the beef curry on a wooden board, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired.
